hero_image_alt: GROVEside host welcoming guests at a business event
hero_headline: Host your next corporate event in a private, nature-infused setting designed to inspire and impress.
page_intro_paragraphs: Whether it's a networking event, team-building activity, product launch, seminar, workshop, strategic planning session, brainstorming meeting, client presentation, training program or company celebration, GROVEside offers the perfect backdrop for your business needs.
Surrounded by tranquil nature, our versatile spaces can be tailored to suit your event, ensuring a productive and memorable experience for you and your guests.
pricing_paragraphs: We provide a custom offer based on your event's specific needs and setup – just let us know what you are planning and we will take care of the rest.
Catering options are available for your convenience and can be tailored to suit your needs, with any catering services billed separately.
versatile_setup_heading: Versatile Setup Across the Entire Property
versatile_setup_intro: When you book GROVEside for an event, you enjoy exclusive use of the entire property.

versatile_setup_items.caption: Indoor spaces customisable for presentations, receptions or corporate parties.
Breakout zones, lounges and outdoor areas ready for informal sessions.
Access to the Summer House for private calls or focused moments.
Direct connection to the private terraces for fresh-air networking and relaxed conversations.

tailored_body: Let us bring your vision to life. We are here to assist with layout, logistics and planning support, ensuring a smooth, stress-free experience. Simply tell us your plans and we will handle the rest.
tailored_image_alt: GROVEside team member providing personalised event support
